# @zakkster/lite-profiler

Zero-GC frame and per-phase profiler for JavaScript game loops. Engine-agnostic
core; reactive and GPU layers ship separately.

## Mental model
- Capture is imperative and allocation-free. The hot path only pushes
  performance.now() deltas into pre-allocated Float32Array ring buffers.
- Analysis (percentiles, histogram, capture export) and rendering happen off
  the hot path, reading from those buffers.

## Exports
- Profiler(capacity=1024, phases=[], counters=[]) - beginFrame()/endFrame(),
  begin(tag)/end(tag), beginAt(handle)/endAt(handle), handle(tag), frame,
  phase(tag), phaseAt(handle), reset(), destroy(). Optional counters:
  count(tag,n=1) / countAt(handle,n=1) accumulate per frame (flushed on endFrame),
  counterHandle(tag), counterTagOf(handle), counter(tag), counterAt(handle), counterCount.
- FrameHistogram - update(buffer), bins, total, modeIndex, jankRatio,
  spikeRatio, classify() -> FrameClass.{STEADY,SPIKING,THROTTLED}.
- encodeCapture(profiler, scratch?, meta?) -> ArrayBuffer|null (v2 embeds phase
  tags + optional meta; v3 when counters exist), decodeCapture(arrayBufferOrView) ->
  {version,count,numPhases,frames,phases,tags,meta,counters,counterTags}
  (v1/v2 decode with counters:[],counterTags:[]),
  downloadCapture(buffer, filename?), LITECAP constants.
- summarize(profiler, meta?) -> CaptureSummary {schema,label,engine,timestamp,
  budgetMs,frameCount,capacity,frame:{avg,min,max,p01,p99,fps,jankRatio,spikeRatio,
  frameClass,bins},phases:{[tag]:{avg,min,max,p01,p99,last,count}},
  counters:{[tag]:{sum,avg,min,max,p01,p99,last,count}}}.
  summarizeCapture(decoded, meta?) -> CaptureSummary from a decoded LiteCap.
- diffCaptures(baseline, candidate) -> per-metric {base,cand,delta,pct}.
  checkRegression(baseline, candidate, tolerances?) -> {ok,regressions,diff}.
  assertNoRegression(baseline, candidate, tolerances?) throws RegressionError
  (err.report) past tolerance. DEFAULT_TOLERANCES {frame.avg:0.10,frame.p99:0.10},
  SUMMARY_SCHEMA (=2). Metric paths: frame.<m>, phase.<tag>.<m>, or counter.<tag>.<m>.
  fps is higher-better; counters are lower-is-better and deterministic, so gate them at
  zero tolerance for an exact ceiling ({'counter.floatsUploaded.max':0}). A counter the
  baseline tracked that the candidate stops reporting is a regression (reason: 'metric
  missing in candidate'); frame/phase paths keep the lenient skip.
- FrameBudget, budgetMs(targetFps), isOverBudget(frameMs, targetFps).
- MeterHud(canvas, profiler, options?) - render(), resize(), setMaxMs(),
  destroy().

## Contracts
- Phases are registered once at construction; dynamic registration is not
  supported (it would allocate).
- Counters are likewise registered once. count()/countAt() accumulate within a
  frame and flush one value per counter on endFrame(); a frame with no count()
  records 0. Counters are integers on Float32 rings: per-frame values are exact
  to 2^24, and the summary's counter sum is an exact Float64 total past that.
- begin/end (or beginAt/endAt) must be paired each frame; every registered
  phase must be reported every frame for encodeCapture() to succeed.
- Buffers store Float32; push only finite numbers.

## Dependencies
@zakkster/lite-ring-buffer, @zakkster/lite-stats-math (analysis),
@zakkster/lite-canvas-graph (MeterHud). All zero-runtime-dep siblings.
